title: ranunculus pegaeus var. curvistylis
intro: Ranunculus pegaeus var. curvistylis is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Ranunculus genus, commonly referred to as buttercup. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Ranunculus pegaeus var. curvistylis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make topical creams, salves, and ointments to support skin health and treat various skin conditions.
